context: Tests understanding of plugin.json and marketplace.json schemas, field purposes, and version synchronization

checklist.name: plugin.json schema knowledge
checklist.description: Correctly identifies plugin.json fields: name (codeflash), version (0.1.1), description, author.name, author.url, repository, homepage, license (MIT), keywords.

checklist.name: marketplace.json schema knowledge
checklist.description: Correctly identifies marketplace.json structure: $schema URL, name, owner (name + email), metadata (description + version), plugins array with source (./) and category (development).

checklist.name: Version synchronization
checklist.description: Identifies all 3 version locations and notes that they must stay in sync. Recognizes plugin.json version as the canonical source.

checklist.name: Correct field mapping
checklist.description: registry.json maps fields correctly: name from plugin.json, version from plugin.json, author_email from marketplace.json owner.email, source_url from repository, tags from keywords.
